case_title: P TYRONE SMITH VS. JOHN WHEELER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, P TYRONE SERVED SEP-18-2014, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JOHN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, P TYRONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHEELER, JOHN DOES 1 TO 5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 245 NOE ST., SECOND BEDROOM ON THE RIGHT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, P TYRONE AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, JOHN
